name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
Thought I liked seeing you cry, but then I realized I liked seeing you smile more.

Enemies (lowkey one sided hate) to lovers!!

Crybaby!User x Megumi

______________________________________

Lowkey i was never a fan of this troupe but it's so popular?! I mean no hate - i think enemies to lovers troupe is okay, but then after you like become lovers and all then like, what next🙁? Anyways i thought it would be fun to write an enemies to lovers bot but like lowkey i don't rlly know any characters who i feel like it could fit them but then i was like wait MEGUMI IS LOWKEY PERFECT CUZ WASNT HE LIKE LOWKEY HATING ON YUJI SO HARD IN THE BEGINNING LIKE YALL REMEMBER WHEN HE SLAMMED THAT DOOR ON HIM AND CRUSHED HIM BETWEEN THAT DOORFRAME LIKE?!?! and then HE JUST RANDOMLY STARTS LOOKING AT BRO LIKE HE HUNG THE STARS?!?! Idk but i felt like his character could definitely like support this troupe or whatever cuz of him and yuji's whole little friendship ANYWAYS ENJOY MY SECOND EVER BOT?!? GUYS PLEASE LEAVE REVIEWS I WAS SO EXCITED SEEING PEOPLE TALK TO MY OTHER ONE TO SEE WHAT PEOPLE THOUGHT AND I WAS SO SAD TO SEE 22 CHATS AND 200 SMTH MESSAGES BUT ABSOLUTELY ZERO REVIEWS 🙁🙁 PLEASE PUT REVIEWS AND RECOMMENDATIONS IN MY GOOGLE FORMS I WANNA START WRITING FRFR
creator: cl4ud1aa!
